source_of_truth: This JSON is the machine-readable source of truth for the documentation-only preset table in docs/examples/solar_wind_event_presets.md. The Markdown table is a human-readable mirror.
disclaimer: These are documentation-only preset seeds for Agent Kit skills, not a curated event catalog. Use them to plan narrow, artifact-first paper reproductions, then record exact paper/supplement intervals in provenance. A starting interval is NOT a paper-quality endorsement. See the 'Rules for using these seeds' section in docs/examples/solar_wind_event_presets.md.

quality_label_glossary.paper_quality: Exact paper interval, coordinate basis, calibration, and diagnostic definition matched or intentionally documented.
quality_label_glossary.proxy: Useful physics proxy from available variables, not the paper's calibrated method.
quality_label_glossary.candidate_interval: Interval is plausible but still needs paper/supplement confirmation.
quality_label_glossary.partial_success: Data loaded and artifacts exist, but a core target failed or remains unverified.
quality_label_glossary.representative_proxy: Cache-friendly representative window; replace with the paper figure interval for science.
quality_label_glossary.cached_smoke: Smoke/cache-friendly interval for plumbing checks; not paper-quality.
quality_label_glossary.reduced_sep_proxy: Reduced SEP intensity proxy; telescope/species/energy/onset/fluence definitions not yet reproduced.
quality_label_glossary.availability_failure: Data route returned no usable files in the noted batch; not a reproduction.
quality_label_glossary.metadata_unresolved: Exact DOI/metadata could not be resolved in the noted batch.
quality_label_glossary.single_spacecraft_cis: Single-spacecraft CIS plasma proxy; four-spacecraft fields/positions not used.
quality_label_glossary.fgm_route_empty: FGM data route returned no files in the noted batch.
quality_label_glossary.scouting: Scouting/route-probe window only; not a paper reproduction.
quality_label_glossary.not_paper_exact: Interval/products are a scout, not the exact paper selection.
quality_label_glossary.route_scout: Route-discovery probe for source/variable routing; not a calibrated reproduction.

presets.event: PSP Encounter-1 structured slow wind (Bale et al. 2019)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN 1-min + SWEAP/SPC L3i

presets.event: PSP Encounter-1 Alfvénic velocity spikes (Kasper et al. 2019)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN + SWEAP/SPC velocity moments

presets.event: PSP Encounter-1 switchbacks (Dudok de Wit et al. 2020)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN, optional SWEAP/SPC context

presets.event: PSP Encounter-1 sharp Alfvénic impulses (Horbury et al. 2020)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN + SWEAP/SPC velocity moments
presets.notes: Cache-friendly smoke window; replace with paper figure interval when known.

presets.event: PSP Encounter-1 PVI/intermittent structures (Chhiber et al. 2020)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN, optional SWEAP/SPC context
presets.notes: Smoke interval; cached_smoke until lag/cadence/threshold match the paper.

presets.event: PSP inner-heliosphere turbulence evolution (2020)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN + SWEAP/SPC
presets.notes: Smoke interval; use paper-selected E1/E2 intervals for science.

presets.event: PSP enhanced energy-transfer/cascade-rate paper (2020)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN + SWEAP/SPC proton moments
presets.notes: Smoke interval; proxy unless third-order-law assumptions and lag range are reproduced.

presets.event: PSP magnetic field line switchbacks near the Sun (2020)
presets.data_route: PSP FIELDS MAG RTN + SWEAP/SPC
presets.notes: Smoke interval.

presets.event: Halloween 2003 extreme-speed solar wind (Skoug et al. 2004)
presets.data_route: OMNI HRO 1-min + Wind/ACE context
presets.notes: paper_quality only if timing/source choices match target figure.

presets.event: July 2012 STEREO-A extreme ICME (Liu et al. 2014)
presets.data_route: STEREO-A MAG + PLASTIC 1-min

presets.event: THEMIS substorm onset proxy (Angelopoulos et al. 2008)
presets.data_route: THEMIS-A FGM L2 + ESA moments
presets.notes: proxy until multi-probe timing and ground/auroral context are reproduced.

presets.event: THEMIS dipolarization-front proxy (Runov et al. 2009)
presets.data_route: THEMIS-D FGM L2 + ESA moments
presets.notes: proxy until paper front markers/speed and multi-probe context are reproduced.

presets.event: THEMIS whistler wave-context proxy (Cattell et al. 2008)
presets.data_route: THEMIS-C SCM + EFI + FGM; choose non-empty SCM cadence family (scf/scp/scw)
presets.notes: proxy until waveform amplitude/polarization definitions match the paper.

presets.event: RBSP third-radiation-belt smoke (Baker et al. 2013)
presets.data_route: RBSP-A ECT MagEIS + REPT with suffix-namespaced FEDU/L variables
presets.notes: proxy until multi-day L*/PSD/flux-map diagnostics are reproduced.

presets.event: RBSP local-acceleration smoke (Reeves et al. 2013)
presets.data_route: RBSP-A ECT MagEIS + REPT; EMFISIS/HOPE optional fallback context
presets.notes: proxy until L*/PSD, energy-channel, and acceleration diagnostics are reproduced.

presets.event: MMS asymmetric magnetopause electron-current/heating proxy (Graham et al. 2016)
presets.data_route: MMS1 burst FGM + FPI DES/DIS moments + EDP; run MVA/LMN before interpreting current-sheet signatures
presets.notes: proxy, candidate_interval until paper LMN/curlometer definitions are reproduced.

presets.event: MMS asymmetric reconnection electron-jet proxy (Khotyaintsev et al. 2016)
presets.data_route: MMS1 burst FGM + FPI DES/DIS velocity moments + EDP
presets.notes: proxy, candidate_interval until LMN jet component and paper subinterval are verified.

presets.event: MMS electron scattering/bouncing near diffusion region proxy (Lavraud et al. 2016)
presets.data_route: MMS1 burst FGM + FPI DES moments/distributions + EDP; use *-DIST for pitch-angle or distribution claims
presets.notes: proxy, candidate_interval until PAD/distribution method and paper interval are reproduced.

presets.event: MMS electron-only reconnection availability scout (Phan et al. 2018)
presets.data_route: MMS FGM/FPI/EDP search route; exact supplement interval must be verified before data claims
presets.notes: Scouting window only. availability_failure in Batch 006; do not claim reproduction from this seed alone.

presets.event: MMS symmetric magnetotail EDR diagnostics proxy (Torbert et al. 2018)
presets.data_route: MMS1 burst FGM + FPI DES/DIS moments + EDP; future paper-quality work needs MMS1-4 curlometer/LMN
presets.notes: proxy, candidate_interval until four-spacecraft current and pressure-tensor diagnostics are reproduced.

presets.event: 2007 May STEREO ICME proxy (Liu et al.)
presets.data_route: STEREO-A/B MAG 1min + PLASTIC proton moments; Wind/ACE/OMNI optional context
presets.notes: proxy until paper boundaries, coordinate basis, and spacecraft timing are reproduced.

presets.event: 2007 May STEREO/Wind magnetic-cloud shock-sheath proxy (Möstl et al.)
presets.data_route: STEREO-A/B MAG + PLASTIC, Wind MFI/SWE or OMNI comparison
presets.notes: proxy until time-shifted boundaries and paper sheath/cloud markers are verified.

presets.event: Bastille Day Wind/ACE magnetic-cloud proxy (Lepping/Berdichevsky family)
presets.data_route: Wind MFI/SWE + ACE MAG/SWEPAM + OMNI geomagnetic indices
presets.notes: proxy until shock/sheath/cloud boundaries and magnetic-cloud fit choices match the paper.

presets.event: 2010 Jan 17 SEP longitudinal-spread reduced proxy (Dresing et al.)
presets.data_route: STEREO SEPT reduced-intensity profiles + STEREO MAG context; ACE/Wind only with verified particle-channel metadata
presets.notes: reduced_sep_proxy until telescope/species/energy band/onset/fluence definitions are reproduced.

presets.event: 2010 Aug CME-CME interaction in-situ proxy (Lugaz/Temmer family)
presets.data_route: STEREO MAG/PLASTIC + OMNI/Wind/ACE in-situ context; SECCHI/HI J-map not attempted
presets.notes: proxy, metadata_unresolved until exact paper DOI, HI/J-map products, and arrival-time model are verified.

presets.event: Cluster rolled-up Kelvin-Helmholtz vortex proxy (Hasegawa et al. 2004)
presets.data_route: Cluster C1 CIS PP plasma proxy; Cluster FGM UP route returned no files in Batch 008
presets.notes: proxy until four-spacecraft FGM + positions and paper interval are verified.

presets.event: Cluster turbulent-reconnection proxy (Retinò et al. 2007)
presets.data_route: Cluster C1 CIS PP plasma proxy; FGM/STAFF/CIS aliases and exact sub-interval need verification
presets.notes: proxy until four-spacecraft fields/positions and paper diagnostics are reproduced.

presets.event: Geotail reconnection-structure route scout (Nagai et al. 2013)
presets.data_route: Geotail MGF K0 + LEP K0 (IB_vector, N0, V0, POSITION)
presets.notes: Scouting window only; do not claim Nagai statistical-event reproduction from this seed.

presets.event: St. Patrick's Day 2015 storm context (ionosphere-assimilation and perturbation-source studies)
presets.data_route: OMNI HRO 1-min (SYM_H, BZ_GSM, flow_speed, Pressure, AE_INDEX/AL_INDEX/AU_INDEX) + Kyoto kyoto_dst
presets.notes: Assimilation-context interval; trange_utc_narrow is the narrow storm window. Not a TEC, GNSS, or ionosphere data assimilation reproduction. Distinct science targets sharing one OMNI/Kyoto storm-context bundle.

presets.event: September 2017 storm operational context (GOES XRS / GIC-driver preprint route scout)
presets.data_route: OMNI HRO 1-min + Kyoto kyoto_dst + GOES-15 XRS via pyspedas.goes.xrs(probe="15") (g15_xrs_B_AVG)
presets.notes: XRS is flare/operational context, not a GIC reproduction or calibrated event-selection product.
